mapper.select: SELECT job_no AS jobNo , j.title , p.project_name , p.project_code , j.job_status_no , j.job_type_no , j.priority , FN_GET_JOB_STATUS(j.job_status_no) AS job_status_name , FN_GET_JOB_TYPE(j.job_type_no) AS job_type_name , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(j.priority) AS priority_name , j.manager_id FROM job j JOIN project p ON j.project_no = p.project_no WHERE p.project_code = #{projectCode}
SELECT job_status_no , job_status FROM job_status ORDER BY job_status_no
SELECT job_type_no , job_type FROM job_type ORDER BY job_type_no
SELECT common_no , common_name FROM common WHERE parent_common_no = ( SELECT common_no FROM common WHERE common_name = '우선순위 코드' ) ORDER BY common_no
SELECT m.user_id , m.username FROM vw_member m JOIN vw_project p ON m.project_no = p.project_no JOIN users u ON m.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY u.username
SELECT j.job_no , j.title FROM job j JOIN project p ON j.project_no = p.project_no WHERE project_code = #{projectCode}
mapper.insert:
SELECT JOB_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO job ( job_no, title, content, priority, manager_id, user_id, public_role, start_date, end_date, add_date, progress, job_type_no, job_status_no, project_no, parent_job_no ) VALUES ( #{jobNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{priority}, #{managerId}, #{userId}, #{publicRole}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{progress}, #{jobTypeNo}, #{jobStatusNo}, #{projectNo}, #{parentJobNo} )
